# Fawaz Oduola — n8n Workflow Automation Specialist

## Who I Am
Fawaz Oduola is a workflow automation specialist based in Ibadan, Nigeria, working remotely with small B2B teams worldwide. He builds internal automations using n8n that eliminate manual operational work — connecting tools like HubSpot, Salesforce, Slack, Notion, Airtable, and Google Sheets into automated workflows.

## What I Do
- CRM automation: HubSpot and Salesforce sync, deduplication, auto-enrichment, stage updates
- Lead routing: Automatically assign inbound leads to the right rep based on rules and triggers
- Follow-up sequences: Trigger actions based on deal stage, behavior, or inactivity
- Proposal and document generation: Auto-generate proposals, contracts, and SOWs from CRM data
- Reporting and dashboards: Automated pipeline health reports and performance metrics to Slack or email
- Support ticket automation: Classify, route, and resolve repetitive support tickets without human input

## Proven Results
- 200+ hours saved per month for an IT operations team by automating 800 monthly account lockout tickets
- Proposal generation time reduced from 2 weeks to 25 minutes for a B2B enterprise sales team
- 70% of customer support tickets resolved automatically for a gaming and payments platform

## Services and Pricing
- Starter (one workflow): $500–$1,200 one-time
- Growth (3–5 connected workflows): $2,000–$4,500 one-time
- Retainer (ongoing builds and maintenance): $800–$1,500/month

## Tools I Work With
n8n, HubSpot, Salesforce, Slack, Notion, Airtable, Google Sheets, Google Drive, Stripe, Typeform, Gmail, Outlook, PostgreSQL, MySQL, REST APIs, webhooks, OpenAI, and more.

## Contact
Email: EMAIL@YOURDOMAIN.COM
Website: https://fawazodulola.com
Location: Ibadan, Nigeria (remote-first, works with clients globally)

## Ideal Clients
Small B2B companies with 10–100 employees using 5 or more SaaS tools who are spending significant team time on manual data entry, CRM updates, report generation, or repetitive communication tasks.
